untranslatable_reason: Signal requires regime classification (BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET) which is not provided in ALLOWED REGIMES list (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY available). Additionally, the three confirmation methods (closing price, candle color, opening gap) cannot be precisely distinguished with allowed indicators. The source text is incomplete, making precise rule extraction impossible.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture reversal pattern logic using price action: long entry on close > prev_close (closing price confirmation in bull market), short entry on open < prev_close (opening gap down in bear market). Exit conditions use reversal of entry signals. Regime detection and multi-method confirmation require additional regime classification system not available in constraints.
